item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.1.0

Added

  • App icon and a matching accent color
  • Launch at Login option (via `SMAppService`)
  • Persistent all-time "clips cleaned" statistic
  • App Store distribution support: sandbox entitlements, `APPSTORE` compile flag, and `docs/APP-STORE.md` guide
  • `README.md` and proprietary `LICENSE`

Changed

  • Appcast and DMG downloads are now hosted in a dedicated public repo (`cleanpaste-appcast`) served via GitHub Pages; Sparkle feed URL updated accordingly
  • Rebuilt the menu bar popover UI with a native grouped `Form` (System Settings style) and a capsule primary action button
  • Modernized views to use `.foregroundStyle` and system materials
  • Abstracted updates behind an `AppUpdater` service so Sparkle can be excluded from App Store builds
  • Set the bundle identifier to `com.cleanpaste.CleanPaste`

Fixed

  • Release workflow YAML is now valid (an embedded here-doc previously broke parsing) and publishes to the public appcast repo via a deploy key
  • Auto-strip no longer counts or touches non-text clipboard contents (images, files)
